name: Everybody's Favorite Meatballs
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat the oven to 350° F.
2 Crush the French-fried onions in a food processor until they resemble bread crumbs.
3 Add the crumbs, ground beef, gravy mix, and eggs to a large bowl; mix well.
4 Form the mixture into 1-inch meatballs (about 1 tablespoon per meatball).
5 Place the meatballs on a baking sheet coated with nonstick vegetable spray.
6 Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until cooked through. Makes about 36 meatballs.
7 Serve with ranch dressing as a dipping sauce.
